name: Source Fidelity review for ssr-scoring-validation-use bundle
summary: Accepted after checking the staged bibliographic metadata, study counts, locators, and source-backed statements against the cited Frontiers, ACL Anthology, arXiv, and ResearchGate/public paper pages. Two source-fidelity mismatches in the DREsS and Wolfe records were corrected before this review was recorded.

findings.claim_or_issue: Initial staged metadata overstated or mismatched the DREsS authors/counts and Wolfe authors/sample counts.
findings.why_it_matters: A literature synthesis claim depends on accurate bibliographic and extraction details before it can pass source fidelity review.
findings.recommended_action: Corrections were applied to the staged source, artifact, finding, and claim records before accepting this lane.
